provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male cargo handler in his 30s with stubble and bags under his eyes from rotating shift cycles, wearing a faded charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with integrated pressure seals at the wrists and neck, a reinforced cargo harness with magnetic tool clips and a battered handheld cargo scanner holstered at the hip, heavy mag-lock work boots with scuffed steel toes, a thin chain holding a laminated ship ID tag, the undersuit fabric is a synthetic polymer weave that has been through hundreds of decon cycles showing fading at stress points and a heat-bonded repair patch on the left shoulder, a small radiation dosimeter badge clipped to the chest
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Charcoal pressure suit with helmet and yellow chest rig. Full body on grey bg. Good sci-fi costume, slightly more military than v2.
